name: 24 Hour Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup Green Onions and Tops, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 2 cups of the lettuce in the bottom of a large bowl.
2. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and sugar.
3. Layer eggs atop lettuce in the bowl; sprinkle with more salt.
4. Layer peas, remaining lettuce, bacon, and Swiss cheese on top.
5. Spread mayonnaise over the top, sealing to the edge.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate overnight.
